name: Shadows Of Lir'Ah
short_description: A battle ensues and the fauna of the depths has awaken. Those who seek fortune, those who seek power gathered. You find yourself amidst it all, with no memory on how you reached the Island in the first place. What will you do?
detailed_description:
Shadows of Lir'Ah is an 2D adventure game.

You can become the overlord of the war, been gifted godlike power, a clever diplomatic or as nimble as a squirrel. But first you wake up as a stunned Bluekin, your name and how you got on this island is uknown to you.

Probably something did hit you when the battle started.

  • Explore the vast island and it's skies and subterrean.

  • Get to know the factions that occupy the island: Baramald, Averion, Diran and Nii'Mephian.

  • Learn new skills and obtain power ups to better navigate the island.

  • Meet with the creatures that lives in this place and uncover the many thruths

  • Uncover all of the 5 Endings

  • Play time for a playthrough may very wildy. Some ending can be reached very quickly ignoring most of the map while other take more time and some knowledge of the gameworld.

"Whispering rumors around the island of Lir'Ah has spreaded and reached the ears of close nations. An ancient door that lead to the gold city of Nii'Meph has been located in the dephts of islands. Adventurers have run and armies are marching to the small Island.

Beneath the chaos on the surface you wake up in a dark cave."
